title: Investment income - Canada.ca
content:
Find out about reporting income earned through investments such as interest, dividends and capital gains.

## Types of investment income
- Lines 12000 and 12010 – Taxable amount of dividends from taxable Canadian corporations Report the taxable amount of dividends (eligible and other than eligible) received from a taxable Canadian corporation.
- Line 12100 – Interest and other investment income Report interest and other investment income, foreign interest and dividend income received.
- Line 12700 – Taxable capital gains Report a capital gain or loss from selling or transferring capital property.
- All types of income List of the types of income to report on an income tax and benefit return.

## Forms and publications
- Claiming deductions, credits and expenses
